## Summary

Describe the change in a few sentences.

## Validation

List the commands you ran, such as:

- `pytest -q`
- `ruff check .`
- `ruff format --check .`
- `mypy maxbridge`

## Contribution Checklist

- [ ] The change fits the local-first bridge and archive scope of MAXBRIDGE.
- [ ] The change does not introduce spam features, bulk messaging, hidden automation, or unauthorized account access.
- [ ] Stable core changes remain clearly separated from experimental adapter logic.
- [ ] New comments and docstrings are written in English.
- [ ] New user-facing text uses a normal hyphen and does not use an em dash.
- [ ] Tests or examples were updated where behavior changed.
- [ ] README, docs, or help text were updated if the workflow changed.
